sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67607" key="mhtrw|ako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρῳακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n67607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μητρῷος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἁγιστεῖαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μ. μέτρον</foreign>, of the galliambic, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
